---
title: "Publications"
---

### Lead author publications

1.  **Diaz J**, Redford KH, Reese AT. 2023. Captive and urban environments are associated with distinct gut microbiota in deer mice (*Peromyscus maniculatus*). *Biology Letters*. 19(3), 20220547. [Open Access Link](https://royalsocietypublishing.org/rsbl/article/19/3/20220547/63264/Captive-and-urban-environments-are-associated-with)
2.  **Diaz J**, Reese AT. 2021. Possibilities and limits for using the gut microbiome to improve captive animal health. *Animal microbiome*. 3(1), 89. [Open Access Link](https://link.springer.com/article/10.1186/s42523-021-00155-8)

### Supporting author publications

1.  Kuthyar S, **Diaz J**, Avalos-Villatoro F, Maltecca C, Tiezzi F, Dunn RR, Reese AT. 2023. Domestication shapes the pig gut microbiome and immune traits from the scale of lineage to population. *Journal of evolutionary biology.* 36(12), 1695-1711. [Open Access Link](https://academic.oup.com/jeb/article/36/12/1695/7577280)
